title: Creamy Earthy Croatian Potato Stew
description: A comforting, creamy potato stew packed with earthy vegetables and a velvety flax‑egg binder, perfect for a cozy Croatian-style dinner.

ingredients.name: flaxseed meal
ingredients.notes: mixed with 3 tbsp water to form flax egg

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onions, celery, and carrots; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in mushrooms, smoked paprika, and dried thyme; cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes and pour in the vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.
Whisk coconut milk with the flax‑egg mixture until smooth.
Pour the coconut‑flax mixture into the pot, stirring gently to combine.
Simmer uncovered for an additional 10 minutes, allowing the stew to thicken.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then remove from heat.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
